name: Elizabeth Taylor's Carne Tachonada De Puerto
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Smoked raw ham (1 x 2-inch strip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the ham strips with garlic paste.
2. Insert the ham strips into indentations made in the beef pot roast using a sharp knife.
3. Rub the roast well with salt and pepper.
4. Brown the roast on all sides in hot oil.
5. Combine onion, bell pepper, and tomato puree.
6. Pour the mixture over the roast.
